## Scope

## AI Workspace

For multi-model (ChatGPT / Claude / Codex / Perplexity) work, anchor this PR to the shared workspace and see `AI_WORKSPACE/PR_CHECKLIST.md`.

- Related task in `AI_WORKSPACE/TASKS.md`:
- Decision entry in `AI_WORKSPACE/DECISIONS.md`, if applicable:
- Handoff note in `AI_WORKSPACE/HANDOFFS/`, if applicable:
- Evaluation note in `AI_WORKSPACE/EVALS/`, if applicable:

- `path` — reason

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets changed
- [ ] No unrelated files changed
- [ ] No dashboard.html changes unless PR is specifically about Command Center
- [ ] No async DB rewrite
- [ ] No Redis/vector/local LLM unless issue explicitly requires it
